taskDescription: Arrange the stages of neural tube development in the correct chronological order.
paragraphs: Neural plate forms from thickened ectoderm induced by the notochord (Week 3)
Neural folds elevate and the neural groove deepens along the midline
Neural crest cells migrate from the tips of the neural folds
Neural folds fuse in the midline beginning at the cervical region (Day 22)
Anterior neuropore closes (Day 25) forming the lamina terminalis
Posterior neuropore closes (Day 28) completing the neural tube
